generatedFor: VideoSync desktop packaging and first-run bootstrap

managedRuntime.name: Managed Python Runtime
managedRuntime.trigger: installer first launch or manual repair runtime action
guarantees: Runtime is installed into the app-managed runtime directory.
Torch is pinned to the packaged CUDA build.
Bootstrap fails fast if CUDA wheels are not installed or torch.cuda.is_available() is false.

gptSovitsRuntime.name: GPT-SoVITS Isolated Runtime
gptSovitsRuntime.trigger: GPT-SoVITS warmup or first synthesis request
gptSovitsRuntime.pythonSource: reuse managed bundled python and create isolated virtual environment
guarantees: Bootstrap runs inside the app-managed runtime.
Windows bootstrap avoids build-only dependencies that require local compilation.
The isolated GPT-SoVITS runtime reuses the managed CUDA-enabled PyTorch stack.
